headline: Reasons to Hold Tandem Diabetes Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: New pump launches, CGM integrations and strong solvency support Tandem Diabetes' growth outlook, though intense competition and macro headwinds remain risks.

headline: Edwards Lifesciences Stock Up 22.1% in a Year: What's Driving It?
summary: EW shares jump 22.1% in a year as growth in TMTT and strong adoption of PASCAL, EVOQUE and SAPIEN technologies fuel momentum.
